CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. This formula shows the annual rate of return on the seller's total initial cash investment. If Seller's Nominal Rate of Return is less than or equal to -100%, calculating an annual rate is mathematically impossible, so this formula will return -99999%.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This formula shows the annual rate of return on the seller's total initial cash investment. If Seller's Nominal Rate of Return is less than or equal to -100%, calculating an annual rate is mathematically impossible, so this formula will return -99999%.
CustomField.label: Seller's Annual Rate of Return
